title: Dyschoriste trichocalyx

This plant is native to Madagascar and is part of the genus Dyschoriste, which contains around 40 species of plants. The species Dyschoriste trichocalyx is likely classified as a type of shrub or herb, although the exact classification may vary depending on the source.
